boundary: External references are context-only or claim-boundary references. They do not validate NHM2, the selected run, a physical mechanism, propulsion, or full tensor closure.

refs.title: The warp drive: hyper-fast travel within general relativity
refs.allowedCaptionUse: Context for warp-metric geometry and energy-condition caveats.
refs.forbiddenCaptionUse: Do not claim Alcubierre validates NHM2, propulsion, FTL, or Casimir-to-curvature closure.

refs.title: Warp drive with zero expansion
refs.allowedCaptionUse: Context for zero-expansion warp-drive metric construction and shell-style curvature visualization.
refs.forbiddenCaptionUse: Do not claim Natario validates the NHM2 solve, the Casimir mechanism, or a physical warp drive.

refs.title: The unphysical nature of warp drive
refs.allowedCaptionUse: Context for quantum-inequality restrictions on negative-energy warp metrics.
refs.forbiddenCaptionUse: Do not claim QEI pass, physical feasibility, or validated negative-energy sourcing.

refs.title: Energy inequalities in quantum field theory
refs.allowedCaptionUse: Context for why QEI or quantum-energy-inequality gates are treated as separate audit obligations.
refs.forbiddenCaptionUse: Do not claim a QEI dossier is complete or passed unless the NHM2 ledger provides that evidence.

refs.title: Demonstration of the Casimir Force in the 0.6 to 6 micrometer range
refs.allowedCaptionUse: Context for laboratory Casimir-force measurement as a separate phenomenon from NHM2 curvature sourcing.
refs.forbiddenCaptionUse: Do not claim laboratory Casimir-force measurements prove NHM2 curvature, propulsion, or source closure.

refs.title: The Casimir force between real materials: Experiment and theory
refs.allowedCaptionUse: Context for real-material Casimir modeling limits and why tile/process depictions are not field-intensity maps.
refs.forbiddenCaptionUse: Do not claim real-material Casimir theory validates NHM2 source closure or a physical mechanism.

refs.title: Introducing physical warp drives
refs.allowedCaptionUse: Context for broader warp-drive taxonomy and why NHM2 remains diagnostic unless its own gates pass.
refs.forbiddenCaptionUse: Do not import positive-energy or physical-warp-drive claims into NHM2.

refs.title: Generic warp drives violate the null energy condition
refs.allowedCaptionUse: Context for energy-condition boundary language and observer-frame caution.
refs.forbiddenCaptionUse: Do not claim NHM2 evades NEC or WEC unless repo evidence explicitly proves the required observer/tensor conditions.
